channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Lutnick retracts Epstein 'blackmail' claim during House committee interview
item.description: Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick, speaking to House lawmakers, distanced himself from his earlier assertion about convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein...

item.title: DOJ sues to block D.C. bar from disbarring lawyer over Trump election claims
item.description: The Justice Department launched a new legal battle against the D.C. bar, suing to prevent it from disciplining Jeffrey Clark, a former department official involved in...

item.title: Raphael Goes to Rome, Courtesy of the Met
item.description: Two ambitious popes, tapestries, and the rival Michelangelo influence the final decade of 'the prince of artists.'

item.title: AI in the Classroom Is Our Most Senseless Education Experiment Yet
item.description: As AI enters schools, we overlook the value of challenging students with difficult tasks.
